user.title: Connect a Pixelblaze
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Pixelblaze.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname (e.g. 192.168.1.42 or pixelblaze.local).
data_description.name: Optional friendly name. Defaults to the device's configured name.

discovery_confirm.title: Pixelblaze discovered
discovery_confirm.description: Found Pixelblaze {name} at {host}. Add it to Home Assistant?

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Pixelblaze
reauth_confirm.description: Update the host for this Pixelblaze.

error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Enter a hostname or IP address.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the device for state. Lower values are more responsive but use more bandwidth.
data_description.disable_beacon_listener: Disable the UDP beacon listener used for automatic discovery. Useful if port 1889 conflicts with other software.

set_variable.name: Set variable
set_variable.description: Set a single exported variable on the active pattern.

set_variables.name: Set multiple variables
set_variables.description: Set several exported variables on the active pattern at once.

set_pattern.name: Set active pattern
set_pattern.description: Activate a pattern by id or name.

set_color_control.name: Set color control
set_color_control.description: Set an HSV color picker on the active pattern.

run_playlist.name: Run playlist
run_playlist.description: Switch to playlist mode for the given playlist id.

refresh_pattern_list.name: Refresh pattern list
refresh_pattern_list.description: Force a refresh of the cached pattern list.

activate_scene.name: Activate scene
activate_scene.description: Atomically apply a pattern, brightness, variables, and/or sequencer mode in one call.

get_variables.name: Get variables
get_variables.description: Read the active pattern's exported variables.
